title: Bajaj Allianz Life is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Allianz Life is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz Life in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!
